rulings.Case Title: THE AVINOAM MANDELBROT FAMILY TRUST DATED JULY 19, 2005
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notices Of Pendency Of Action Alternatively To Require Petitioners To File Undertaking Alternatively For Trustee To Post Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: This hearing is contiued to June 15, 2022 at 2:00 p.m., following request of moving party in March 17, 2022 Objection to Untimely Filing of Opposition Papers and Conditional Request for Continuance of Motion to Expunge Notices of Pendency of Action; Alternatively to Require Petitioners to File Undertaking; Alternatively for Trustee to Post Undertaking.
